Linear_analogue_scale_before.description: Linear analogue scale (cm) for itching assessment, before treatment period, averaged over two days for 13 patients. This variable and Linear_analogue_scale_during and Linear_analogue_scale_after are repeated measures on the same subjects across different time periods.

Linear_analogue_scale_during.description: Linear analogue scale (cm) for itching assessment, during aspirin treatment period, averaged over two days for 13 patients. Same subjects as Linear_analogue_scale_before and Linear_analogue_scale_after.

Linear_analogue_scale_after.description: Linear analogue scale (cm) for itching assessment, after treatment period, averaged over two days for 13 patients. Same subjects as Linear_analogue_scale_before and Linear_analogue_scale_during.

Nocturnal_limb_movements_before.description: Nocturnal limb movements (scratching measure), before treatment period, averaged over two days for 13 patients. Same subjects as Nocturnal_limb_movements_during and Nocturnal_limb_movements_after.

Nocturnal_limb_movements_during.description: Nocturnal limb movements (scratching measure), during aspirin treatment period, averaged over two days for 13 patients. Same subjects as Nocturnal_limb_movements_before and Nocturnal_limb_movements_after.

Nocturnal_limb_movements_after.description: Nocturnal limb movements (scratching measure), after treatment period, averaged over two days for 13 patients. Same subjects as Nocturnal_limb_movements_before and Nocturnal_limb_movements_during.

Treatment_period.description: Treatment period indicating the phase of the study: before aspirin treatment, during aspirin treatment (900 mg), and after aspirin treatment.
